methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $11M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Climate & Energy (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 9 same-sector peers exist in Climate & Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

data.narrative:
Aepnus Technology is a seed-stage Climate & Energy company founded by Lukas Hackl and Bilen Akuzum. The company has raised $10.6M to date. The relevant peer universe comprises one public company (LNZA) and eight private firms operating in Climate & Energy, including Helion, Redwood Materials, QuantumScape, KoBold Metals, and Electric Hydrogen.

Stage-progression methodology is the primary applicable valuation approach. Using total capital raised ($10.6M) as a proxy for seed-stage valuation, a 2.5x multiplier from Seed to next stage implies an enterprise value of $26.5M. This multiplier reflects typical step-ups observed in frontier energy and materials ventures advancing from seed to Series A. Peer-median triangulation could not be applied; while nine same-sector peers exist, filtering for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or comparable valuation tier yielded insufficient datapoints (fewer than three required for statistical reliability).

The analysis supports a valuation range of $23M (low) to $30M (high), with a median point of $26M. This single-method triangulation carries elevated uncertainty given the limited comparable data at seed stage in this subsector. Key variables affecting valuation include technology maturity, path to commercial deployment, capital requirements through Series A, and competitive positioning within the crowded frontier energy landscape. Additional diligence on technical differentiation and market timing would refine this range materially.
